why.title: Why ClausulaAI?
why.subtitle: Designed so tenants have the same information as landlords.
why.item1Desc: We incorporate every legal change the day after it's published in the BOE.
why.item2Desc: Analysis based on LAU, Housing Act 12/2023 and INE Resolution 2024.
why.item3Desc: Upload the PDF and get the complete clause-by-clause analysis in under 30 seconds.

howItWorks.title: How it works
howItWorks.step1Desc: Drag or select the PDF of your rental contract. Maximum 10 MB.
howItWorks.step2Desc: Claude AI reads each clause and evaluates it against the current LAU updated to 2026.
howItWorks.step3Desc: Clause-by-clause results with color coding. Download the PDF report.

features.title: What do we analyze?
items: Legal letters: claims, updates and notices
24/7 legal consultation — Get instant answers about the LAU with exact article citations

impact.subtitle: That's what you commit to paying over 5 years of renting
impact.punchline: Making sure the contract is legal costs €3.99
impact.subtext: Less than the price of a coffee.
impact.pricingSub: The cost of not checking can be much higher.

pricing.title: Choose your plan
pricing.subtitle: No mandatory subscription. Pay only what you need.
pricing.conversionCopy: You're committing to paying €900/month for 5 years — that's €54,000 total. Making sure the contract is legal costs €3.99.

single.name: 1 analysis
features: LAU regulations always up to date

pack.name: Pack of 3 analyses
features: LAU regulations always up to date

pro.name: Pro unlimited
pro.description: For real estate agents and managers

items.q: Does the analysis replace a lawyer?
items.a: No. ClausulaAI provides guidance based on current LAU regulations. For complex legal decisions, consult a qualified lawyer.

items.q: What happens to my credits if I don't use them?
items.a: The 3-analysis pack expires after 90 days. The single analysis is valid for 1 year. The Pro plan is unlimited while active.

items.q: Can I cancel the Pro plan anytime?
items.a: Yes, you can cancel at any time from your account. Pro access continues until the end of the billing period.

blog.title: Legal blog
blog.subtitle: Articles about the LAU, rental contracts and tenant rights in Spain
blog.cta: Meanwhile, analyze your contract now — from €3.99

clausulas.title: The 5 most common illegal clauses in rental contracts in Spain 2026
clausulas.excerpt: Discover which clauses, even if signed in your contract, are null and void under the Urban Lease Law and the Housing Law 12/2023.

renta.title: How to legally update your rental rent in 2026
renta.excerpt: Since January 2025, the CPI is no longer a valid index for rent updates. We explain how to apply the new INE index and how much you can raise or lower it.

zonas.title: Stressed housing zones in Spain: what they are and how they affect your contract
zonas.excerpt: The Housing Law 12/2023 introduced stressed residential market zones. If your property is in one, the new rent cannot exceed the previous contract's rent.
